prompt: Initialize feature-documenter. Choose markdown format, professional tone, defaults for depth. Two sibling repos exist: order-service (has pom.xml) and user-service (has package.json with @nestjs/core).

assertions.text: Creates .feature-docs/_settings.md with format=markdown and tone=professional in frontmatter
Creates .feature-docs/_repos.md with both repos listed and correct tech stacks

prompt: Initialize feature-documenter. Sibling directories: api-gateway (has package.json with express), auth-service (has go.mod), billing-service (has pom.xml with spring-boot-starter-web), web-app (has package.json with react but no express/nestjs).

assertions.text: billing-service is identified as Spring Boot (Java)
web-app is either excluded or flagged as a frontend app (not a backend service)

prompt: Initialize feature-documenter. .feature-docs/_settings.md already exists with format=notion, tone=conversational.

assertions.text: Skill detects the existing configuration and tells the user
Skill shows the current settings (notion format, conversational tone)
Skill asks whether to reconfigure or keep existing settings
Skill does not overwrite the existing config without asking
